title: Alectorolophus subalpinus
intro: Alectorolophus subalpinus, also known as Alectorolophus, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing pain and improving overall health. The bioactive constituents of Alectorolophus subalpinus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Alectorolophus is often used to prepare teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into herbal concoctions such as infusions and decoctions.
